visualizerParams.title: Clean Automorphic Check via Strings
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided `is_automorphic` function uses a while loop and modulo arithmetic to compare digits. Refactor it to use Python's string methods for a more intuitive and readable check.

solution.explanation: Refactoring to use strings makes the logic much more intuitive: we're checking if the string representation of the square ends with the string representation of the number itself. This eliminates the need for manual digit manipulation using modulo and floor division.
